title: Friends & Foes - Perfect Parity Moobloom Fix
description: Fixes Moobloom texture issues when using Perfect Parity or other Spring to Life backport mods
body:
If you're playing the Friends & Foes mod with another mod that backports the changes the model of the Cow (e.g. Perfect Parity), chances are the model for the Moobloom will look all messed up and weird because it's using the old Cow textures rather than the new ones added in 1.21.5. 

This resource pack basically fixes that. Now you can use Friends & Foes with Perfect Parity, or any other backport mods that change the Cow's model!
